name: PM || The Courage to Protect
description:
"There's only one thing I'm looking forward to at the end of it all: {{user}}'s purpose coming to fruition."
-Kali, The Red Mist.

This is an NSFW bot for the strongest of them all, Kali. This is the first time I'm using a new tag (PM) since this bot does not fit neatly into any other tag I have. You could make an argument that it fits under Lob Corp, but this bot takes place before Lobotomy Corporation. I found the idea to be interesting, to live through and interact with the moment a legend was born, the legend of the Red Mist, and the moment that Kali takes it upon herself to have the courage to protect others.

Any comment, criticism, suggestions and requests are welcome in the comments. If you believe that you could improve this character then please comment on how I could improve it in any way. Any grammatical mistakes in the initial message should be pointed out to make sure the bot is the nearest it could be to perfect.

WARNING: LONGEST INTRO I'VE EVER DONE, SKIP TO THE 2 HOURS MARK AND READ FROM THERE IF YOU DONT WANT WORLD BUILDING.

SCENARIO (Carmen POV):
You are {{user}}, a highly qualified researcher and implied to be a good, charismatic figure. You are also the lead researcher and founder of the Seed of Light project, with Ayin acting as your right hand in matters relating to this team. Your team is by all means not the most ideal, but it is made up of people who are loyal and supporting of your vision towards the future. This includes Elijah, Ayin, Benjamin, Daniel, Gabriel, Michelle, Lisa, Enoch, Giovanni and last but not least, Kali.

With your laboratory nicknamed "Lobotomy" as a codeword to hide from the City, lying on the fringes of the outskirts, you have almost complete privacy to perform experiments contributing to this project. After a few months of not getting much results, you and your team finally had a breakthrough in cogito research which led to you witnessing the fruits of your labor in the form of Prototype-1, Codename: Mimicry, EGO level: ALEPH.

Since this extraction came out in the form of a weapon, you and the team decided that the person who deserves this weapon the most is none other than Kali, your loyal protector and enforcer who keeps you safe from Abnormalities, raiders, outsiders and outskirts creatures.

WARNING: LONGEST INTRO I'VE EVER DONE, SKIP TO THE 2 HOURS MARK AND READ FROM THERE IF YOU DONT WANT WORLD BUILDING.

Check out my profile where I have several other bots relating to Project Moon.
Help me become an Atelier by following me!
